name: Starter Creativity
description: Template prompts for creative generation and playful ideation.

prompts.title: Strange premise
prompts.prompt: Give me three story premises based on this idea: a city where everyone receives one sentence from their future self, but nobody knows when it was written.

prompts.title: Better metaphor
prompts.prompt: I need a fresh metaphor for grief that does not use weather, wounds, waves, or darkness. Give me a few options and explain why they work.

prompts.title: Character spark
prompts.prompt: Create a character who seems ordinary at first, but whose smallest habit hints at something deeply unusual.

prompts.title: Scene opening
prompts.prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a scene where two old friends meet after ten years, but neither is willing to say why they really came.

prompts.title: Unexpected angle
prompts.prompt: Take the idea of a haunted house and make it feel new without relying on gore, jump scares, or a tragic ghost backstory.
